full_text: Shaheen Afridi to Rahul, Bowled!! Through him. ** Fire, Afridi, fire ** If it was the mother of inswinging yorkers to Rohit, Rahul's done in by the mother of an unplayable inswinging length delivery. And it's not that he's helped himself with his shot here either, trying to whip it across the line, missing big time, with the ball straightening and nipping back in sharply off the pitch, sneaking past the outside of the pad, sneaking past the inside of the bat.
